name: 15V Normatec Charger
description_html: Charge any of your Normatec units wherever you go. Includes a 4 inch cord and three additional plug adapters. Compatible with Normatec 3, Normatec 2.0 and Normatec 2.0 Pro.

name: 18V Wall Charger
description_html: Charge your Hypervolt 3 Pro, Hypervolt 3, Hypervolt 2 Pro, Hypervolt 2, Vyper line, Venom line, and Hypersphere in under two hours. Includes a 4-inch cord and two international plug adapters.

name: Gift Cards
description_html: Give the ultimate gift of cutting-edge warmup and recovery tech. Emailed in approximately 2 hours or less.

name: Heated Head Attachment 3
description_html: Upgrade your massage gun with 3 levels of heat, reaching up to 120°F. Compatible with the Hypervolt 3 line only, the Heated Head Attachment helps relax tight muscles and maintain your full range of motion.

name: Hyperboot by Nike × Hyperice
description_html: Heat and Normatec dynamic air compression combine in a device that will leave your feet, ankles, and up feeling refreshed.

name: Hyperice Contrast 2 Knee
description_html: Fully electronic contrast therapy device delivering next-level performance with deeper cold, more powerful heat, and built-in air compression—so you can warm up faster, recover smarter, and come back stronger.

name: Hyperice Contrast 2 Shoulder
description_html: Hyperice Contrast 2 Shoulder is a fully electronic contrast therapy device that delivers next-level performance with deeper cold, more powerful heat, and built-in compression—so you can warm up faster, recover smarter, and come back stronger.

name: Hyperice X 2 Knee
description_html: Fully electronic contrast therapy device delivering next-level performance with deeper cold, more powerful heat, and built-in air compression—so you can warm up faster, recover smarter, and come back stronger.

name: Hyperice X 2 Shoulder
description_html: Hyperice X 2 Shoulder is a fully electronic contrast therapy device that delivers next-level performance with deeper cold, more powerful heat, and built-in compression—so you can warm up faster, recover smarter, and come back stronger.

name: Hypersphere Go
description_html: Perfect for travel, the TSA friendly Hypersphere Go targets your tightest areas with precision to help you move better wherever you roam.

name: Hypervolt 2
description_html: The original Hypervolt with some serious upgrades - lighter, more powerful, a newly designed handle, and now in black. Give your muscles the daily relief they've been asking for.

name: Hypervolt 2 Pro Battery
description_html: Never run out of power with a spare battery. Compatible with the Hypervolt 2 Pro device only. Features include a colored light halo to indicate the battery level, soft-touch exterior, and a grip handle for added comfort.

name: Hypervolt 3
description_html: For everyday movers, the Hypervolt 3 is designed to loosen tight muscles, melt away daily tension, and help you feel better from the moment you wake up to when you wind down.

name: Hypervolt 3 Pro
description_html: Hypervolt 3 Pro is built for athletes and high performers who need to warm up faster, recover stronger, and keep moving at their peak. Its powerful percussion reaches into the toughest muscle groups to unlock mobility, reduce stiffness, and accelerate recovery between intense training sessions.

name: Hypervolt Applicator Set
description_html: Featuring five head attachments so you can customize your experience. Compatible with Hypervolt 1 and Hypervolt 2 line (not compatible with Hypervolt 3 line).

name: Hypervolt Go 2
description_html: The ultimate portable percussion massager to help loosen muscle knots and provide relief on the go or at home. With a lightweight, versatile, and sleek design, it’s more than an ordinary massage gun.

name: Hypervolt Go 3
description_html: Lightweight, travel-ready massage gun designed for life on the move. Perfect for increasing range of motion and improving mobility anywhere, whether you’re traveling, heading to the gym, or squeezing in recovery between meetings.

name: Normatec 3 Control Unit
description_html: Operate your Normatec system and select custom features. The Normatec 3 Control Unit is compatible with all Normatec line products.

name: Normatec 3 Full Body
description_html: Normatec 3 Full Body includes legs, hips and arms attachment for a full body massage and is designed to help increase circulation, revive muscles, and reduce swelling.

name: Normatec 3 Legs
description_html: Dynamic air compression massage to advance your wellness, recover faster, improve your training, and maximize your performance.

name: Normatec 3 Lower Body
description_html: Normatec 3 Lower Body comes with both legs and hips attachments to advance your wellness, recover faster, improve your training, and maximize your performance.

name: Normatec Arm Attachment Single
description_html: Normatec Arm Attachment provides a dynamic air compression massage all the way from your shoulders to your fingertips.

name: Normatec Arm Attachments
description_html: The Normatec Arm Attachments provide a dynamic air compression massage all the way from your shoulders to your fingertips.

name: Normatec Backpack
description_html: Designed specifically for the Normatec 3 recovery systems. Features include a detachable Normatec control unit case with a padded lining, compression-molded sunglass case, elastic side pockets, and a laptop compartment.

name: Normatec Carry Case
description_html: Custom designed case to fit your Normatec 3 recovery system. Easily pack your control unit, hose, power supply and all system attachments.

name: Normatec Elite Hips
description_html: Raise your game with the same patented dynamic air compression technology relied on by the pros for years. Warm up quickly, recover faster, and feel fully revived with Normatec’s restorative massage.

name: Normatec Elite Legs
description_html: Say goodbye to hoses and separate control units and experience the pinnacle of recovery with Normatec Elite Legs.

name: Normatec Go
description_html: Normatec Go is a completely portable device that delivers dynamic air compression massage to the calf muscles to increase circulation and reduce pain and tension in the legs.

name: Normatec Hip Attachment
description_html: The Normatec hip attachment provides next-level compression to your lower back and hip area so you can warm up and recover faster.

name: Normatec Hose
description_html: Replacement hose to connect one or two attachments to any Normatec unit. Compatible with Normatec 3, Normatec 2.0 and Normatec 2.0 Pro.

name: Normatec Leg Attachment Single
description_html: Includes premium grade locking zippers and a specialized foot design that applies compression to the bottom of your foot without squeezing your toes uncomfortably.

name: Normatec Leg Attachments
description_html: The Normatec Leg Attachments feature premium materials and overlapping zones for gapless compression.

name: Normatec Lower Legs
description_html: Normatec Lower Legs are completely portable and deliver dynamic air compression to the calf muscles to speed up your recovery time.

name: Normatec Premier Hips
description_html: Raise your game with the same patented dynamic air compression technology relied on by the pros for years. Warm up quickly, recover faster, and feel fully revived with Normatec’s restorative massage.

name: Normatec Premier Legs
description_html: Say goodbye to hoses and separate control units and experience the pinnacle of recovery with Normatec Premier Legs.

name: Open Box Hyperice X Knee
description_html: Advanced hot and cold contrast therapy for your knee to decrease inflammation and reduce pain.

name: Open Box Hyperice X Shoulder
description_html: Advanced hot and cold contrast therapy for your shoulder to decrease inflammation and reduce pain.

name: Open Box Hypervolt 2 Black
description_html: Meet the next-gen recovery: Hypervolt 2. Enhanced features, superior performance. A true testament to Hyperice's commitment to innovation.

name: Open Box Hypervolt 2 Pro
description_html: Warm up faster and recover like a pro with our most powerful percussion massage device.

name: Open Box Hypervolt Go 2
description_html: Our most compact percussion massage device, designed to release muscle soreness on-the-move now in black.

name: Open Box Normatec 2 Legs
description_html: Open Box Normatec 2 Legs

name: Open Box Normatec 3 Legs
description_html: Normatec 3 Legs is a dynamic air compression massage that helps your legs feel refreshed faster.

name: Open Box Normatec Elite
description_html: No hoses or separate control units. Experience the pinnacle of recovery with Open Box Normatec Elite.

name: Open Box Normatec Go
description_html: For relief on the go. Normatec Go gives your calf muscles a dynamic air compression massage.

name: Open Box Venom 2 Back
description_html: The perfect combination of heat and vibration to warm up and soothe sore lower back muscles.

name: Open Box Venom 2 Leg
description_html: Melt away stress and tension in your leg with a powerful heated vibration massage from Venom 2 Leg.

name: Open Box Venom 2 Shoulder
description_html: Heat and vibration paired together to loosen muscle knots and maintain flexibility in the shoulders.

name: Open Box Venom Go
description_html: Customizable heat and vibration spot treatment to relieve sore and tight muscles.

name: Open Box Vyper 3
description_html: The Vyper 3 accelerates your warm up, speeds recovery time, and keeps you moving better.

name: Venom 2 Back
description_html: The most advanced heat and massage wrap on the market. Designed with HyperHeat™ technology for consistent, even heating for instant, soothing relief to sore back muscles.

name: Venom 2 Leg
description_html: The Venom 2 Leg heats up so fast it will leave your leg feeling a sense of relief nearly instantly. The surface area is 2x larger than the original and features our HyperHeat™ technology.

name: Venom 2 Shoulder
description_html: The Venom 2 Shoulder heats up 6x faster than a standard heating pad providing instant, soothing relief to sore muscles.

name: Venom Go
description_html: Venom Go is a revolutionary heat + vibration wearable with unmatched versatility and customization. Choose from 9 combinations of heat and vibration to soothe sore muscles in an instant.

name: Venom Go Case
description_html: The Venom Go Case provides lightweight protection to store and carry your Venom Go pod and pads while on the move. The case can carry a single pod and up to 5 reusable pads at once.

name: Venom Go Pack
description_html: The Venom Go Pack is designed to soothe your sore muscles wherever life takes you. The Venom Go Pack includes Venom Go, Venom Go Case and Venom Go Refill Pack.

name: Venom Go Refill Pack
description_html: Venom Go pads are designed specifically for the Venom Go. The refill pack contains 3 reusable pads each providing up to 20 uses per pad.

name: Vyper 3
description_html: All systems activated. Prime your body with a powerful vibrating massage. Vyper 3 accelerates your warm up, speeds recovery time, and keeps you moving better.
